biography: Chukwunonso Nwachukwu "Nonso" Anozie (born 28 May 1979) is a British actor who has worked on stage, film, and television. He is best known for his role as Tank in RocknRolla (2008), Seargent Dap in Ender's Game (2008), Abraham Kenyatta in the TV series Zoo (2015), and Xaro Xhoan Daxos in the HBO TV series Game of Thrones (2011).
name: Nonso Anozie
